ddls:
CREATE TABLE "universities" (
  "university_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each university */,
  "university_name" TEXT /* Name of the university */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the university */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the university */,
  "region" TEXT /* Geographic region of the university */,
  "institution_type" TEXT /* Type of institution (e.g., public, private) */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website URL of the university */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("university_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "retention_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each retention statistic */,
  "university_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the university */,
  "year" TEXT /* Year the data was recorded */,
  "retention_rate" REAL /* Retention rate for that year */,
  "student_cohort" INTEGER /* Number of students in the entering cohort */,
  "freshman_to_sophomore_rate" REAL /* Retention rate from freshman to sophomore year */,
  "graduation_rate" REAL /* Overall graduation rate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_retention_stats_university_id FOREIGN KEY ("university_id") REFERENCES universities ("university_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial_aid" (
  "aid_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial aid record */,
  "university_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the university */,
  "year" TEXT /* Year the data was recorded */,
  "pct_pell_grants" REAL /* Percentage of students receiving Pell Grants */,
  "total_students" INTEGER /* Total number of students */,
  "avg_financial_aid_amount" REAL /* Average amount of financial aid per student */,
  "scholarship_distribution" TEXT /* Breakdown of different types of scholarships */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("aid_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_aid_university_id FOREIGN KEY ("university_id") REFERENCES universities ("university_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "enrollment_stats" (
  "enroll_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each enrollment statistic */,
  "university_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the university */,
  "year" TEXT /* Year the data was recorded */,
  "acceptance_rate" REAL /* Acceptance rate for that year */,
  "total_applicants" INTEGER /* Total number of applicants */,
  "yield_rate" REAL /* Percentage of accepted students who enroll */,
  "international_students" INTEGER /* Number of international students */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("enroll_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollment_stats_university_id FOREIGN KEY ("university_id") REFERENCES universities ("university_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "student_demographics" (
  "demo_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic record */,
  "university_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the university */,
  "year" TEXT /* Year the data was recorded */,
  "gender_distribution" TEXT /* Distribution of genders within the student body */,
  "ethnicity_distribution" TEXT /* Distribution of ethnicities within the student body */,
  "average_age" REAL /* Average age of the student body */,
  "first_generation_students" REAL /* Percentage of first-generation college students */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demo_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_demographics_university_id FOREIGN KEY ("university_id") REFERENCES universities ("university_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_accounts" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user account */,
  "university_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the university the user belongs to */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the user account */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, data_entry) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  "account_status" TEXT /* Status of the account (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_accounts_university_id FOREIGN KEY ("university_id") REFERENCES universities ("university_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who accessed the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the data was accessed */,
  "data_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the data accessed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_accounts ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "benchmarking" (
  "benchmark_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each benchmarking record */,
  "university_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the university */,
  "peer_group" TEXT /* Group of peer universities for comparison */,
  "metric" TEXT /* Metric being benchmarked (e.g., retention rate, acceptance rate) */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the metric for the university */,
  "year" TEXT /* Year the data was recorded */,
  "national_average" REAL /* National average for the metric */,
  "peer_average" REAL /* Average for the peer group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("benchmark_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_benchmarking_university_id FOREIGN KEY ("university_id") REFERENCES universities ("university_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction */,
  "university_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the university */,
  "metric" TEXT /* Metric being predicted (e.g., retention rate, acceptance rate) */,
  "predicted_value" REAL /* Predicted value of the metric */,
  "year" TEXT /* Year the prediction is for */,
  "confidence_interval" TEXT /* Confidence interval for the prediction */,
  "model_used" TEXT /* Type of predictive model used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_university_id FOREIGN KEY ("university_id") REFERENCES universities ("university_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "university_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the university the report is for */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the report */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the report */,
  "generation_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., annual, quarterly) */,
  "author" TEXT /* Author of the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_university_id FOREIGN KEY ("university_id") REFERENCES universities ("university_id")
)
